name: seo-analyzer
title: SEO Analyzer - Free On-Page SEO Audit Tool (Score 0-100)
description: Free Ahrefs Site Audit & Screaming Frog alternative. Audit any URL for 15+ on-page SEO factors: title tag, meta description, heading hierarchy (H1-H6), image alt text, internal/external links, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD structured data, canonical URL, robots meta, viewport, hreflang. Weighted SEO score 0-100 with detailed breakdown. Bulk URL processing, CI/CD webhook integration, CSV/JSON/Excel export. No API keys, no subscription. Pay-per-use pricing from $0.01/URL.
